name: Student Loan Navigation
description: Student loan navigation session that helps borrowers understand repayment options including standard, income-driven (IDR), and Public Service Loan Forgiveness (PSLF), and build a strategy aligned with their career and financial situation. NOT financial advice.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.

types.name: Student Loan Strategy
types.description: Generated student loan repayment strategy from session data.
